behavior_summary: This script implements the pentagram item's gameplay logic: area-entry cleanup, player 'U8P_PENT::use' interactions (menus, validation, placement/removal of sorcerous components), and reactions to hits near the pentagram (cinematic/tongue reaction, possible item destruction).

U8P_PENT::enterFastArea (main) runs when an actor enters the pentagram trigger and performs spatial/frame/map gated cleanup of nearby items (destroying or removing items that violate positional or frame rules).
Multiple helper routines build and manage UI menus, classify pentagram components by type/frame/slot, validate candle/focus placement, and orchestrate spawn/suspend cinematics and SFX loops.

The script relies heavily on spatial tests (Item::getX/Y/Z, FREE::isWithinRange, FREE::getDistanceBetween), frame/type checks for slot validation, and spawned FREE::* helper processes to present prompts, delays, and camera/animation sequences.
notable_control_flow: Area-triggered cleanup is gated by global state and map/frame checks (acolyteKilled, Npc::getMap == 0x0C, Item::getFrame == 0x04) before iterating nearby items and possibly calling Item::destroy.

Many user-facing flows are menu-driven: large menu-builder functions (U8P_PENT::func4206, U8P_PENT::func215E, U8P_PENT::func180C, U8P_PENT::func3347) create MenuAdd/MenuRemove sets and then SuspendAssign/strcmp read the user's choice to continue.

Hit reaction (U8P_PENT::gotHit) mixes immediate destroy-paths (driven by process_result() of spawned confirm prompts) and cinematic non-destroy branches that set global 'tonguing', spawn camera/SFX processes, set avatar stasis, and later clear it.
Spawn + suspend loops are used pervasively to sequence audiovisual effects (FREE::*), SFX loops (U8P_PENT::pentagramSFXLoop), and confirmation prompts (FREE::askYesNo, FREE::func121C).
open_questions: Exact polarity and full gating intent of the acolyteKilled test in U8P_PENT::enterFastArea: decompilation shows the flag tested but polarity/context is slightly ambiguous.

Precise mapping from item frame values to semantic 'slot' identities — frame ranges are used heavily (U8P_PENT::isPentagramPieceForSlot, U8P_PENT::func138D, U8P_PENT::func180C) but the canonical slot->frame table is inferred rather than explicit.
Full semantics of the 'tonguing' and 'pyrosFree' globals (their lifecycle and broader game impact) are inferred from usage in U8P_PENT::gotHit but not fully defined here.
Some control-flow uses low-confidence decompiler artifacts (jmp_NOPRINT) that may hide edge-case branches or additional flag writes; those branches are not represented in full detail.

main_function.name: U8P_PENT::enterFastArea
main_function.purpose: On area entry, conditionally enforce pentagram integrity and clean up misplaced or invalid items around the pentagram (item destruction/removal when map/frame/spatial conditions indicate an invalid placement).
entry_conditions: Called by the engine when an actor enters the pentagram trigger region (U8P_PENT::enterFastArea).
Gated by a global state read (acolyteKilled) before performing cleanup.
Additional local checks of Npc::getMap(...) == 0x0C and Item::getFrame(this) == 0x04 determine whether the full cleanup sequence runs.

function_map.name: U8P_PENT::enterFastArea
function_map.role: Area-entry behavior: pentagram cleanup and spatial enforcement.

function_map.name: U8P_PENT::gotHit
function_map.role: Handle hits near pentagram: gate on globals, spatial containment checks, set 'tonguing' state, spawn cinematic/UI helpers, possibly destroy or move offending items.

function_map.name: U8P_PENT::use
function_map.role: Player 'U8P_PENT::use' interaction: validate focus/candle placement, provide guidance barks, build menus and launch placement/removal flows.

function_map.name: U8P_PENT::func0BCF
function_map.role: Menu preparation / candidate collection and cinematic spawn sequence (includes an aggressive bark).

function_map.name: U8P_PENT::isPentagramPieceForSlot
function_map.role: Validate whether an item frame/type matches a given pentagram slot index.

function_map.name: U8P_PENT::func1066
function_map.role: Compute offsets from an item and spawn a FIRESPEL visual effect at that location.

function_map.name: U8P_PENT::func10C3
function_map.role: Destroy an item and attempt a legal_create replacement, play SFX and spawn follow-up helpers.

function_map.name: U8P_PENT::func1151
function_map.role: Short spawn-and-cleanup helper: spawn FREE helper, suspend, then destroy item.

function_map.name: U8P_PENT::pentagramSFXLoop
function_map.role: Continuously play pentagram SFX by looping playSFX and suspending on spawned timing helpers.

function_map.name: U8P_PENT::func11BF
function_map.role: Create temporary items at offsets and ask the player yes/no per-item to decide subsequent destruction (preview/confirm helper).

function_map.name: U8P_PENT::func138D
function_map.role: Selector utility: scan candidate(s) and return the first item whose frame matches selector-specific allowed frames.

function_map.name: U8P_PENT::func180C
function_map.role: Assign items into slot-tracker locals and set item frames to reflect placement — menu/frame update helper.

function_map.name: U8P_PENT::func215E
function_map.role: Large menu/slot manager: validate candidates, remove from source lists, add to per-slot option containers, and set per-slot flags.

function_map.name: U8P_PENT::func3347
function_map.role: Build removal/clear menus for items on the pentagram, ensure NPC can receive items, and delegate selection handling to U8P_PENT::func3757.

function_map.name: U8P_PENT::func3757
function_map.role: Drive the post-menu selection flow: spawn camera/animation helpers, suspend for player choice, and execute transfer/removal cinematics and state updates.

function_map.name: U8P_PENT::func3940
function_map.role: Spatial evaluator: compare candidate coordinates to this item to choose a candidate based on quadrant + distance threshold.

function_map.name: U8P_PENT::func39E7
function_map.role: Small menu-builder: test candidate against several offset ranges and accumulate passing items into an options list.

function_map.name: U8P_PENT::func39E7
function_map.role: Small menu-builder: test candidate against several offset ranges and accumulate passing items into an options list.

function_map.name: U8P_PENT::func3B43
function_map.role: Prune menu options by spatial region and candidate frame, removing inappropriate entries from a presented menu.

function_map.name: U8P_PENT::func4206
function_map.role: Very large UI/menu builder: assign strings, build many option lists, filter by slot/type/proximity and produce player-facing menu text.

function_map.name: U8P_PENT::func5336
function_map.role: Proximity test: determines if a stack item lies within a rectangular region relative to this item (used to detect 'standing too close').

internal_calls.purpose: Compute a focus/candle positional state or candidate count used to validate missing/multiple foci before opening placement menus.
Build a menu/options list of nearby candidate items by spatial sectors used in the placement/removal flow.
Prune the menu/options list according to candidate position and frame before presenting choices to the player.
Spawn fire/spell visual effects in cinematic reaction branches (positioned by U8P_PENT::func1066 offsets).
Check whether a nearby item fits a given slot to decide candidate menu addition and whether to run a cinematic/attack sequence.
Delegate post-menu selection handling and the final transfer/removal cinematic to U8P_PENT::func3757 which waits for user choice.
Compute candidate selection from prebuilt menu/frame state before presenting the final UI prompt.
Build/update slot/frame data used by U8P_PENT::func215E to construct the user menu.
Perform large-scale menu assembly and flag writes; result used to present the selection UI (FREE::func121C) and complete action.

external_calls.purpose: Remove misplaced or invalid items during area-entry cleanup.
Query item coordinates, frame and type to drive spatial, frame-range and type-based classification and validation.
Spatial tests used to decide menu categorization, candidate selection, and distance gating (e.g., U8P_PENT::func3940, U8P_PENT::func39E7, U8P_PENT::func4206).
Spawn UI prompts, delays, and camera/animation helpers; used with suspend/process_result() to decide destroy vs cinematic flows.
Play sound effects for item destruction and pentagram ambient loops.
Spawn fire/spell visual effects at computed coordinates (positional VFX helper).
Attempt to create a replacement item after destroying one, gating follow-up SFX/behavior on legal_create success.
Ensure NPC equipment placeholder and test whether NPC can legally receive items popped from the pentagram during removal flows.
Freeze/unfreeze player control during cinematic sequences triggered by hit reactions.

reads.name: acolyteKilled
reads.likely_effect: Gate: used to decide whether U8P_PENT::enterFastArea cleanup should run or to choose U8P_PENT::use() bark branches; its value influences whether the pentagram enforcements are active.

reads.name: tonguing
reads.likely_effect: Guard: read in U8P_PENT::gotHit to suppress duplicate tongue/cinematic reactions when already active.

reads.name: pyrosFree
reads.likely_effect: Guard: read in U8P_PENT::gotHit as an additional gating condition to skip hit reactions when set.

reads.name: vardionJoined / baneJoined / sponsorTest
reads.likely_effect: Read by U8P_PENT::use() to select alternate explanatory barks or cinematic entry branches depending on party/sponsor state.

writes.name: tonguing
writes.likely_effect: Set by U8P_PENT::gotHit when a hit triggers a tongue/pull cinematic; indicates a global interaction state to prevent reentrancy.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script implements the pentagram item's gameplay logic: area-entry cleanup, player 'U8P_PENT::use' interactions (menus, validation, placement/removal of sorcerous components), and reactions to hits near the pentagram (cinematic/tongue reaction, possible item destruction).
